module.title: SAP TM Reporting, Analytics & Performance Management

topic.title: End-to-End Reporting & Analytics in SAP TM

learningObjectives.title: Understand end-to-end analytics lifecycle
learningObjectives.description: Explain how planning, execution, settlement, and integration data drive business intelligence.

learningObjectives.title: Understand reporting technologies
learningObjectives.description: Identify SAP Fiori, SAP Analytics Cloud, embedded analytics, and KPI frameworks.

learningObjectives.title: Understand decision-driven improvement
learningObjectives.description: Describe how analytics insights support optimization and continuous improvement.

sections.title: End-to-End Reporting & Analytics in SAP TM

sections.content: Reporting and Analytics complete the SAP Transportation Management lifecycle by converting transportation data into actionable business intelligence. Information collected during planning, execution, freight settlement and integration is transformed into dashboards, KPIs and executive reports that support operational monitoring, strategic planning and continuous improvement.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: Every transportation activity generates business data. Reporting transforms that data into information, while analytics converts information into better business decisions.

A global logistics company reviews monthly SAP TM dashboards. Operational reports identify delayed shipments, carrier scorecards highlight underperforming providers, transportation cost analytics reveal expensive routes and predictive analytics forecast seasonal capacity shortages. Based on these insights, management optimizes carrier allocation, transportation planning and budgeting.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Combine operational dashboards, KPIs, predictive analytics and executive reporting to create a complete transportation performance management framework.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A multinational automotive manufacturer integrated SAP TM reporting with SAP Analytics Cloud and predictive analytics. By monitoring transportation KPIs continuously, the company improved carrier performance, reduced freight costs and increased on-time delivery across multiple regions.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: For SAP TM certification, remember the complete reporting hierarchy: Operational Reports → KPIs → Dashboards → Analytics → Executive Decision Support → Continuous Improvement.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Reporting alone does not improve transportation performance. Business value is realized only when analytical insights lead to measurable operational improvements.

items: Reporting converts transportation data into business information.
Analytics transforms information into business decisions.
KPIs measure transportation performance across all business processes.
SAP Fiori and SAP Analytics Cloud provide powerful reporting capabilities.
Continuous analytics supports ongoing transportation optimization and strategic planning.
